title: Ashen Custom Mobs
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

___
Looking to jazz up some of the mobs you'll encounter while you use Ashen 16x? This pack adds custom mob models to complement the textures included in Ashen 16x. 

Mobs currently included in the pack:
- Sheep
- Chickens
- Cows
- Mooshrooms
- Pigs
- Husks
- Endermen
- Withers
- Blazes

This add-on **requires** Optifine, Continuity, or another equivalent in order to function!

Place this pack *above* Ashen in your load order.

___
![Compatibility](https://i.imgur.com/MwVLhEd.png)

This pack **_is not_** compatible with Fresh_LX's [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations). If you use Fresh Animations, and want to use Ashen Custom Mobs alongside it, please use [this pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-custom-mobs-x-fresh-animations) instead.

This pack is designed and intended for use with [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen).
___

[![Bisect Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/3c357293-8dfb-410a-a5e3-0d778833e154.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/aim-boot)
